name: icalp-skills
description: Depth pack for ICALP (EATCS) Track A/B routing, the single annual February deadline, lightweight double-blind HotCRP submission, the 15-page extended abstract with full-version appendix, proof rigor, the Track B rebuttal, and the LIPIcs open-access camera-ready.

plugins.name: icalp-skills
plugins.description: Twelve ICALP-specific skills for the EATCS International Colloquium on Automata, Languages, and Programming, its Track A / Track B structure, and its LIPIcs open-access publication model, grounded in the ICALP 2026 (53rd, Royal Holloway) call, EATCS pages, LIPIcs/Dagstuhl, and dblp.
